zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Isabella Bethia Wylie Forbes於1458年5月8日出生在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安武坡 堂 本 薩爾圖時，她的父親James Forbes 2nd Lord Forbes44歲，母親Egidia Keith34歲。她於1475年與James Abernethy 3rd Lord Saltoun of Abernethy在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1520年2月1日在她的家鄉享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Isabella Bethia Wylie Forbes于1458年5月8日出生在英国苏格兰易亞斯特 洛迪安武坡 堂 本 薩爾圖时，她的父亲James Forbes 2nd Lord Forbes44岁，母亲Egidia Keith34岁。她于1475年与James Abernethy 3rd Lord Saltoun of Abernethy在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1520年2月1日在她的家乡享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wylie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: from a Scots pet form of the personal name   William  .
English: variant of   Wiley  .

variants.name: William
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English personal name William, Willam, Willem, an Old Picard and Norman French form of ancient Germanic Willihelm, composed of the elements wil- ‘will, desire’ + helm- ‘helmet, protection’. This Norman personal name became widely used in England, Scotland and Wales after the Conquest, mainly no doubt in honor of the Conqueror himself. By the 13th century it had already become the most popular personal name in England. A Parisian form of the name Guillaume was also sometimes used (see Gillam ), which in medieval Wales was adopted as Gwilym (see Gwilliam ).
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Guillaume  .

variants.name: Wyllie
meanings: Scottish (Ayrshire and Lanarkshire): variant of   Wylie  .

nameMeanings.name: Forbes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Forbes in Tullynessle, Aberdeenshire, so named from Gaelic forba ‘field, district’ + the locative suffix -ais. The placename is pronounced in two syllables, with the stress on the second, and the surname until recently reflected this. Today, however, it is generally a monosyllable.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Firbhisigh ‘son of Fearbhisigh’, a personal name composed of elements meaning ‘man’ + ‘prosperity’.
History: A family of this name (see 2 above) in Connacht was famous for its traditional historians, compilers of the Book of Lecan.

variants.name: Fawbush
meanings: Altered form of Scottish   Forbes  , which ispronounced as two syllables in Aberdeenshire. Compare   Forbush  .

variants.name: Forbus
meanings: Altered form of Scottish   Forbes  , reflecting thetraditional pronunciation as two syllables.

variants.name: Forbush
meanings: Scottish: altered form of   Forbes  , which was traditionally pronounced as two syllables. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Altered form of German Vorbusch, a topographic name for someone living on the edge of a wood, from vor ‘in front of’ + North German Busch ‘wood, bush’.

variants.name: Fobbs
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Forbes  .

variants.name: Furbush
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish   Forbes  , which is traditionally pronounced as two syllables. Compare   Furbish  .

variants.name: Forbis
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Forbes  , reflecting the traditional pronunciation as two syllables.

variants.name: Fobes
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Forbes  .

variants.name: Forbess
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Forbes  , reflecting the traditional pronunciation as two syllables.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

nameMeanings.name: Bethia
meanings: Different forms of Bithia.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Isabella Bethia Wylie Forbes was born on 8 May 1458, in Upper Town of Saltoun, East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, James Forbes 2nd Lord Forbes, was 44 and her mother, Egidia Keith, was 34. She married James Abernethy 3rd Lord Saltoun of Abernethy in 1475, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 1 February 1520, in her hometown, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Isabella Bethia Wylie Forbes est née le 8 mai 1458, à Upper Town of Saltoun, East Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, James Forbes 2nd Lord Forbes, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Egidia Keith, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé James Abernethy 3rd Lord Saltoun of Abernethy en 1475, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 1 février 1520, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Isabella Bethia Wylie Forbes am 8. Mai 1458 in Upper Town of Saltoun, East Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater James Forbes 2nd Lord Forbes 44 und ihre Mutter Egidia Keith 34. Sie hat 1475 in Scotland James Abernethy 3rd Lord Saltoun of Abernethy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. Februar 1520 im Alter von 61 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Isabella Bethia Wylie Forbes è nata il il 8 maggio 1458 nel Upper Town of Saltoun, East Lothian, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, James Forbes 2nd Lord Forbes, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Egidia Keith, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato James Abernethy 3rd Lord Saltoun of Abernethy nel 1475, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 1 febbraio 1520, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Isabella Bethia Wylie Forbesが1458年5月8日にイギリススコットランドエアスト ロスアンウップエル トウン オフ サルトウンで生まれた時，父James Forbes 2nd Lord Forbesは44歳，母Egidia Keithは34歳であった。1475年にスコットランドでJames Abernethy 3rd Lord Saltoun of Abernethyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1520年2月1日に故郷で61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Isabella Bethia Wylie Forbes(이)가 1458년 5월 8일 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 업퍼 타운 프 살토우에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James Forbes 2nd Lord Forbes(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Egidia Keith(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1475년 스컷랜드에서 James Abernethy 3rd Lord Saltoun of Abernethy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1520년 2월 1일 그녀의 고향에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Isabella Bethia Wylie Forbes nasceu em 8 de maio de 1458, em Upper Town of Saltoun, East Lothian, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, James Forbes 2nd Lord Forbes, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Egidia Keith, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com James Abernethy 3rd Lord Saltoun of Abernethy em 1475, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1 de fevereiro de 1520, em sua cidade natal, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Isabella Bethia Wylie Forbes родилась 8 мая 1458 г. в местности уппир тоун оф салтоун, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени James Forbes 2nd Lord Forbes было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Egidia Keith, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James Abernethy 3rd Lord Saltoun of Abernethy в 1475 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 1 февраля 1520 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Isabella Bethia Wylie Forbes nació el 8 de mayo de 1458, en Upper Town of Saltoun, East Lothian, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, James Forbes 2nd Lord Forbes, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Egidia Keith, tenía 34 años. Se casó con James Abernethy 3rd Lord Saltoun of Abernethy en 1475, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 1 de febrero de 1520, en su pueblo, a la edad de 61 años.
